(1) इन िनयम犘 का संि楹瀉त नाम क琉टनाशी (ि獧तीय संशोधन) िनयम, 2018 है । (2) ये राजप灴 म犆 उनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ瀄त ह犘गे । -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 2. क琉टनाशी िनयम, 1971 म犆 ‘‘दूसरी अनुसूची’’ के 瀡थान पर िन瀓निलिखत अनुसूची रखी जाएगी, अथा榁त् :-- ‘‘‘‘‘‘‘‘दूसरी दूसरी दूसरी दूसरी अनुसूची अनुसूची अनुसूची अनुसूची’’’’’’’’ (िनयम 25 देख犆) (िनयम 25 देख犆) (िनयम 25 देख犆) (िनयम 25 देख犆) ‘‘‘‘‘‘‘‘क琉टनािशय犘 क琉टनािशय犘 क琉टनािशय犘 क琉टनािशय犘 या जैव क琉टनाशक犘 के नमून犘 के परी楹ण या िव瀙ले या जैव क琉टनाशक犘 के नमून犘 के परी楹ण या िव瀙ले या जैव क琉टनाशक犘 के नमून犘 के परी楹ण या िव瀙ले या जैव क琉टनाशक犘 के नमून犘 के परी楹ण या िव瀙लेषण के िलए फ琉स षण के िलए फ琉स षण के िलए फ琉स षण के िलए फ琉स 1. क琉टनाशक犘 के नमूने के िलए िन瀓निलिखत िव瀙लेषणा瀄मक तकनीक犘 獧ारा परी楹ण फ琉स, िजसका स琈灙य घटक 榀ात है । (I) गैस वण榁लेखन - 牱.... 6500/नमूना (II) उ榔च 灹दश榁न तरल वण榁लेखन - 牱.... 7500/नमूना (III) यूवी-दृ瀙य 瀡पे榉灩ोफोटोमीटर - 牱.... 5500/नमूना (IV) फू琇रयर 灩ांसफाम榁 अवर榉त 瀡पे榉灩ोफोटोमीटर - 牱.... 6000/नमूना (V) टाइ灩ीमे灩ीक - 牱.... 4000/नमूना 2. जैव-क琉टनाशक के नमूने के िलए परी楹ण फ琉स, िजसका स琈灙य घटक 榀ात है । - 牱.... 4000/नमूना 3. जैव-उतपाद नमूने से नीचे उि瀖लिखत जैव-उ瀄पि瀄त के रिज瀡灩ीकृत जैव-क琉टनाशक क琉 उपि瀡थित का परी楹ण करने के िलए परी楹ण शु瀖क, िजसका स琈灙य घटक 榀ात नह牷 है । (I) केवल नािभक琉य पािलहाइ灱ोिसस िवषाणु या 灡ैनुलोिसस िवषाणु - 牱.... 2000/नमूना (II) केवल जीवाणु - 牱.... 2000/नमूना (III) केवल कवक - 牱.... 2000/नमूना (IV) (I), (II) और (III) के िलए - 牱.... 6000/नमूना 4. क琉टनाशी या जैव-क琉टनाशक犘 के नमून犘 के िव瀙लेषण के िलए परी楹ण फ琉स, िजसके स琈灙य घटक 榀ात नह牷 है । (I) तरल 灙ोमैटो灡ाफ- मास 瀡पे榉灩ोमीटर - 牱.... 15,500/नमूना (II) गैस 灙ोमैटो灡ाफ- मास 瀡पे榉灩ोमीटर - 牱.... 10,500/नमूना 5. इस अनुसूची म犆 िविन琖द榁瀠ट से िभ瀈न क琉टनािशय犘 या जैव-क琉टनाशक犘 या कोई िविन琔म榁ित क琉 बाबत परी楹ण या िव瀙लेषण के िलए फ琉स क犆灶ीय सरकार या समय-समय पर इस िनिम瀄त 灹ािधकृत 琈कसी अ瀈य अिधकारी 獧ारा िविन琖द榁瀠ट 琈कया जाएगा’’। [फा.सं. 17-6/2006-पीपी-।] डा. बी.राजे瀈दर, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पण ण ण ण:::: मूल िनयम, भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (i) म犆 सं榐यांक सा....का....िन.... 1650(अ), तारीख 19 अ榉तूबर, 1971 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और त瀄प瀙चात् िनम्निलिखत 獧ारा संशोिधत 琈कए गए थे— 1. सा....का....िन.... 474(अ), तारीख 24 जुलाई, 1976, 2. सा....का....िन.... तारीख 11 जुलाई, 2013, 13. सा....का....िन.... 797(अ), तारीख 13 नव瀓बर, 2014, 14. सा....का....िन.... 840(अ), तारीख 5 नव瀓बर,2015, 15. सा....का....िन.... 164(अ), तारीख 15 फरवरी, 2016, 16. सा....का....िन.... 794(अ), तारीख 12 अग瀡त, 2016, 17. सा....का....िन.... 79(अ), तारीख 27 जनवरी, 2017, 18. सा....का....िन.... 106(अ), तारीख 1 फरवरी, 2017, 19. सा....का....िन.... 1229(अ), तारीख 4 अ榉तूबर, 2017 , 20. सा....का....िन.... 1588(अ), तारीख 22 琈दस瀓बर, 2017, और 21. सा....का....िन.... 399(अ), तारीख 20 अ灹ैल, 2018 । MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FARMERS WELFARE (Department of Agriculture, Co-operation and Farmers Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th December, 2018 G.S.R. 1204(E).—Whereas the draft rules further to amend the Insecticides Rules, 1971, was published as required by section 36 of the Insecticides Act, 1968 (46 of 1968) vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare (Department of Agriculture, Co-operation and Farmers Welfare) number G.S.R. 724 (E), dated the 31st July, 2018, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section-3, Sub-section (i), inviting objections or suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby, before the expiry of a period of thirty days from the date on which the copies of the Gazette of India in which the said notification was published were made available to the public; And whereas, copies of the said Gazette notification were made available to the public on 31st July, 2018; And whereas, the objection or suggestion received from the public in respect of the draft rules within the period specified in the said notification have been considered by the Central Government; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 36 of the Insecticides Act, 1968 (46 of 1968), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Insecticides Rules, 1971, namely :- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Insecticides (Second Amendment) Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Insecticide Rules, 1971, for the “THE SECOND SCHEDULE’’, the following Schedule shall be substituted, namely:- -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] “SECOND SCHEDULE” (See rules 25) “ FEES FOR TESTING OR ANALYSING THE SAMPLES OF INSECTICIDES OR BIOPESTICIDE 1. Testing fees by following analytical techniques for samples of Insecticides whose active ingredient is known. (I) Gas chromatograph -Rs. 6500/ sample (II) High performance liquid chromatograph -Rs.7500/sample (III) UV-visible Spectrophotometer -Rs. 5500/sample (IV) Fourier Transform Infra – Red Spectrometer -Rs. 6000/sample (V) Titrimetric -Rs. 4000/sample. 2. Testing fees for sample of bio-pesticide whose active ingredient is known-Rs. 4000/sample. 3. Testing fees to test presence of registered bio-pesticide of below mentioned Bio-origin from bio-product sample whose active ingredient is not known. (I) Nuclear Polyhedrosis Virus or Granulosis virus only -Rs. 2000/sample (II) Bacteria only -Rs. 2000/sample (III) Fungi only -Rs. 2000/sample (IV) For (I), (II) & (III) -Rs. 6000/sample 4. Testing fees for analysis of samples of insecticide or bio-pesticides whose active ingredients is not known. (I) Liquid Chromatograph – Mass -Rs. 15,500 /sample Spectrometer (II) Gas Chromatograph – Mass -Rs. 10,500 /sample Spectrometer 5. The fees for test or analysis in respect of insecticide or bio-pesticide or any formulation other than the ones specified in this Schedule shall be specified by the central Government or by any other officer authorized in this behalf from time to time’’. [ F. No. 17-6/2006-PP-I ] Dr. B. RAJENDER, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (i) number G.S.R. 1650 (E), dated the 19th October, 1971 and subsequently amended vide:- 1. G.S.R. 474(E), dated 24th July, 1976, 2. G.S.R. 736(E), dated 9th December, 1977, 3. G.S.R. 1064(E), dated 7th November, 1988, 4. G.S.R. 533(E), dated 6th August, 1993, 5. G.S.R. 692(E), dated 7th November, 2006, 10. G.S.R. 128(E), dated 26th February, 2009, 11. G.S.R. 174(E), dated 5th March, 2010, 12. G.S.R. 474(E), dated 11th July, 2013, 13. G.S.R. 797(E), dated 13th November, 2014, 14. G.S.R. 840(E), dated 5th November, 2015, 15. G.S.R. 164(E), dated 15th February, 2016 16. G.S.R. 794 (E), dated 12th August, 2016, 17. G.S.R.79(E), dated 27th January, 2017, 18. G.S.R. 106(E), dated 1st February, 2017 19. G.S.R. 1229(E), dated 4th October, 2017, 20. G.S.R. 1588(E), dated 22nd December, 2017; and 21. G.S.R. 399(E), dated 20th April, 2018.
